sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n96038" key="spondeiopara/lhktos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">σπονδειο-παράληκτος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, of a verse <sense id="n96038.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">with a spondee before the last syllable</tr_>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Tz.</author> </bibl> in <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">An.Ox.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">3.311</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
